documents.title: Morning ICU prescription
documents.content: Meropenem started. Patient febrile overnight with worsening abdominal tenderness, tachypnea, and concern for infection source. BP 92/58, HR 118, Temp 38.4 C, SpO2 92%, RR 27.

documents.title: Morning lab panel
documents.content:
WBC 16.8 K/uL
Lactate 3.8 mmol/L
Creatinine 1.9 mg/dL
